sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54724" key="kata/parsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατά-παρσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.23</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.64</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
